attributes.action: Stop allowing US military aircraft to use land in UK to refuel or re-arm.
attributes.additional_details: The unprovoked war on Iran by the US and Israel has been declared illegal by various international organisations and many countries. By allowing the US to use our airbases to refuel and load up with bombs we are directly enabling the bombing of civilians and essential infrastructure in a foreign country which poses no threat to the UK, and making the UK complicit in war crimes. We should immediately withdraw permission for the US to use British land for ANY military purposes.
attributes.background: Immediately withdraw permission for the US to use any air base on British soil for military purposes, whether fuelling or loading munitions, or 'defence'.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
